channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ENIL] Entertainment Network India Ltd Receives Income Tax Assessment Order for FY 2023-24 with Rs. 113.20 Crore Demand
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Entertainment Network (India) Ltd has received an income tax assessment order under section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961 dated 27 March 2026 from the Assessment Unit of the Income Tax Department for the Assessment Year 2024-25. The order imposes a tax demand of Rs. 113.20 Crore, including applicable interest. The company is currently evaluating the assessment order and believes it has adequate legal and factual grounds to contest the observations and adjustments made in the assessment order. The order does not have a major adverse impact on the company's financial position, operations, or other activities.

  • Entertainment Network (India) Ltd received an income tax assessment order under section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961 dated 27 March 2026.
  • The order imposes a tax demand of Rs. 113.20 Crore, including applicable interest on the company.
  • The company is evaluating the assessment order and believes it has legal and factual grounds to contest the observations and adjustments made.
  • The assessment order does not have a major adverse impact on the company's financial position, operations, or other activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENTERTAINMENT NETWORK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [RAMKY] Ramky Infrastructure Ltd Closes Trading Window for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from 01.04.2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended 31.03.2026. This decision is in accordance with the Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations 2015 and SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The closure is due to the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended 31st March, 2026. All insiders, designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised to refrain from trading in the securities of the Company during this period.

  • Ramky Infrastructure Ltd closes trading window from 01.04.2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the FY ended 31.03.2026
  • This decision is in accordance with the Prohibition of Insider Trading Regulations 2015 and SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • The closure is due to the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial Year ended 31st March, 2026
  • All insiders, designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised to refrain from trading in the securities of the Company during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAMKY INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AMITINT] Amit International Ltd to Consider Appointment of New Independent Director
item.description:
Amit International Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting on 03/04/2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of the appointment of Mr. Narany Ramesh Vishawkarma as an Additional Independent Director. The meeting will also address any other business with the permission of the Chairperson.

  • Amit International Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for 03/04/2026
  • The meeting will consider the appointment of Mr. Narany Ramesh Vishawkarma as an Additional Independent Director
  • The appointment is subject to the approval of the Board of Directors
  • The meeting will also address any other business with the permission of the Chairperson

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMIT INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MUNOTHFI] Munoth Financial Services Ltd. Closes Trading Window Before Q4 Results
item.description:
Munoth Financial Services Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for buying or selling of the company's shares. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Trading window for Munoth Financial Services Ltd. to be closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Closure aims to ensure fair trading practices during the announcement of Q4 results.
  • Trading to resume 48 hours after the audited financial results are declared.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MUNOTH FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AMITINT] Amit International Ltd Proposes Appointment of Mr. Narany Ramesh Vishawkarma as Additional Independent Director
item.description:
Amit International Limited has announced its intention to appoint Mr. Narany Ramesh Vishawkarma as an Additional Independent Director. This decision is subject to the approval of the Board of Directors. The appointment, if approved, will add to the diversity and experience of the board, potentially enhancing its decision-making capabilities.

  • Amit International Ltd proposes the appointment of Mr. Narany Ramesh Vishawkarma as an Additional Independent Director.
  • The proposed appointment is subject to the approval of the Board of Directors.
  • The appointment could enhance the board's decision-making capabilities.
  • Mr. Narany Ramesh Vishawkarma's experience and skills could contribute to the board's effectiveness.
  • The appointment could bring a fresh perspective to the board's discussions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMIT INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q1 2022-2023 After Implementation of Resolution Plan
item.description:
BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th June 2022, following the implementation of the Resolution Plan approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The company was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, and due to this, the financial results could not be finalized and submitted within the prescribed timelines. The Resolution Plan has granted appropriate reliefs and immunities to the company for effective implementation, including relief from past non-compliances such as delay in submission of financial results.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. has submitted its standalone and consolidated financial results for Q1 2022-2023, following the implementation of the NCLT-approved Resolution Plan.
  • The company was undergoing CIRP under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, causing delays in financial result submissions.
  • Appropriate reliefs and immunities have been granted to the company under the Resolution Plan for effective implementation.
  • The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and were subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.
  • The submission regularizes past compliances as part of the Resolution Plan.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Overdue Financial Results for Quarter & Financial Year Ended 31st December 2021
item.description:
BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st December 2021, following the implementation of the Resolution Plan approved by the NCLT. The company was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and could not finalize the results within the prescribed timelines. The Resolution Plan has granted appropriate reliefs and immunities for effective implementation. The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. submits overdue financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st December 2021.
  • Results declared following the implementation of the Resolution Plan approved by the NCLT.
  • Company was undergoing CIRP and could not finalize results within timelines.
  • Resolution Plan grants appropriate reliefs and immunities for effective implementation.
  • Financial results prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and subject to Limited Review by Statutory Auditors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Overdue Financial Results for Q1 & FY 2022 After NCLT Approval
item.description:
🔥 Trending

BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2022, following the approval of the Resolution Plan by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The company was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), which led to delays in finalizing and submitting financial results. The approved Resolution Plan grants appropriate reliefs and immunities to ensure effective implementation. The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and are subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. submits overdue financial results for Q1 and FY 2022 after NCLT approval.
  • Results are prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and subject to Limited Review by Statutory Auditors.
  • Company was undergoing CIRP under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
  • NCLT approval of Resolution Plan grants reliefs and immunities for effective implementation.
  • Results delayed due to management vestiture with the Resolution Professional during CIRP.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q2 & FY ended 30th September 2021
item.description:
🔥 Trending

BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th September 2021, following the approval of the Resolution Plan by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The company was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and could not finalize and submit the results within the prescribed timelines. The Resolution Plan has granted appropriate reliefs and immunities for effective implementation, allowing the company to submit the financial results and regularize past compliances.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. has submitted its standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th September 2021.
  • The results were delayed due to the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
  • The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has approved the Resolution Plan, granting appropriate reliefs and immunities for effective implementation.
  • The company has now regularized past compliances by submitting the financial results.
  • The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Financial Results for Q1 2021-2022 After NCLT Approval
item.description:
🔥 Trending

BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th June 2021, pursuant to the implementation of the Resolution Plan approved by the NCLT. The company, which was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, could not finalize and submit the financial results within the prescribed timelines due to the aforesaid circumstances. However, with the approval of the Resolution Plan, the company has been granted appropriate reliefs/immunities for effective implementation of the plan, including regularization of past non-compliances such as delay in submission of financial results.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. has submitted its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th June 2021.
  • The results were declared in pursuance with the implementation of the Resolution Plan as approved by the NCLT.
  • The company was undergoing CIRP under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, which led to the delay in submitting the financial results.
  • The Resolution Plan has granted the company appropriate reliefs/immunities for effective implementation, including regularization of past non-compliances.
  • The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
